items.name: Blank Load-bearing vest
items.description:
Think of this as an empty canvas. With public ugc being out now, if anyone wants to create their own custom additions (or just wear it as it is without bulky text) they now have the ability!

Reuploading of my assets however will result in DMCA strikes, please do not steal. Put your creative mind to the test. All you need is a few blender tutorials and time!

Like my stuff? Check out our growing community: https://www.roblox.com/groups/4053244/Tactical-Enhancements#!/about
